title: BenchmarkResult
description: Standardized result record for one system evaluated on one scenario.

expected_decision.description: Ground-truth expected decision for this scenario

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock evaluation time in milliseconds (median over N iterations)

m1_enforcement_policy_edits.description: M1: Number of SHACL shape or Rego allow/deny rule edits required to support this scenario

m2_semantic_edits.description: M2: Number of OWL class definition edits required

m3_data_edits.description: M3: Number of enterprise data fact additions/changes required

m4_classification_code_edits.description: M4: Number of Rego predicate (e.g. is_production_server) edits required

m5_dependent_policies_affected.description: M5: Number of enforcement policies that automatically benefited from a shared abstraction change

explanation.description: Structured explanation of how the decision was reached

asserted_facts.description: Raw facts from the scenario that were used

inferred_facts.description: Facts derived by OWL inference or Rego predicate evaluation

violated_policy.description: Name of the SHACL shape or Rego rule that triggered the decision
